_comment: LIVE in-play scores ONLY — written by the server-side side job (scripts/worldcup/live/write-live-scores.ts) from API-Football live feed, NOT by the client. Display-only; never a prediction input. The UI polls this ~every 30s. Empty when nothing is in play. During the tournament run: npx tsx scripts/worldcup/live/write-live-scores.ts --watch --interval 30 --out ui-v2/public/live-scores.json
